markdown:
#  What are the two 'Billing Type' options in Procore Pay invoices? 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
#####  Procore Pay Integrates with the Modernized Subcontractor Invoicing Experience
in Procore Pay, lien wavers are powered by Levelset, a Procore Company. To manage lien waivers with the Invoice Management tools in Procore, your Procore users must be using the modernized subcontractor invoicing experience.
### Background
For companies using Procore Pay to manage Lien Waivers in the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) tools on a Procore project, invoice creators and administrators can use two (2) **Billing Type** option buttons in the General Information card of the New Invoice page. These options are only available with Procore Pay.
![New Invoice Progress Billing Options](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b59af7506b7d4f58fdc8f97c3bf0cd9d/dafec0d31a98a197e8085afe51c5c540/new-invoice-progress-billing-options.png?fm=webp)
### Answer
This table details the new Billing Type options on the New Invoice page. To learn the difference between the lien waiver types, see [What types of lien waiver templates can you create in Procore Pay?](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/about-lien-waivers)  
| **Progress Billing**  | When the invoice payee is billing incrementally for work completed over the course of a construction project.  | Generate a **Progress Conditional** and/or a **Progress Unconditional** waiver, depending on the default template set in the Invoicing tool's Settings.  | 
  * [Enable Lien Waivers & Set Default Templates on Projects ](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-templates-on-projects)
  * [Generate Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/generate-lien-waivers)

 |  
| --- | --- | --- | --- |  
| **Final Billing**  | When the invoice payee is submitting the final invoice on a construction project.  | Generate a **Final Conditional** and/or a **Final** **Unconditional** waiver, depending on the default template set in the Invoicing tool's Settings.  |   |

  * [What variables can we include as placeholders in a lien waiver template?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-variables-can-we-include-as-placeholders-in-a-lien-waiver-template)
title: What are the two 'Billing Type' options in Procore Pay invoices?
description: Describes the 'Billing Type' options that are included with Procore Pay on the New Invoice page in the Invoice Management tools on a Procore project.
